data_preprocessing.name: D1: 3 fNIRS types + baseline mean subtraction
data_preprocessing.reason: Baseline subtraction removes pre-video offset; only HbO/HbR/HbT are used.

data_preprocessing.name: D2: 6 fNIRS types + baseline mean subtraction
data_preprocessing.reason: Adds Abs 780/805/830; extra raw absorption evidence is controlled by CCMI gates.

data_preprocessing.name: D3: 6 fNIRS types + no baseline subtraction
data_preprocessing.reason: Keeps slow drift and absolute offset; tests whether baseline mean contains emotion signal.
data_preprocessing.conclusion: Does not generalize; falls back to 098.

data_preprocessing.name: D4: 6 fNIRS types + trial z-score
data_preprocessing.reason: Removes trial-level amplitude and keeps within-video shape only.
data_preprocessing.conclusion: Bad smoke result; do not run full CV.

data_preprocessing.name: D5: 6 fNIRS types + subject z-score
data_preprocessing.reason: Removes subject-level amplitude shift; tests cross-subject scale drift.
data_preprocessing.conclusion: Bad smoke result; subject amplitude has useful signal.

ccmi_fusion.name: C1: OOF agreement weighted
ccmi_fusion.reason: Weights EEG and fNIRS residual experts by OOF MSE and requires sign agreement.

ccmi_fusion.name: C2: MinMagnitudeAgreement
ccmi_fusion.reason: Uses sign agreement and min(|EEG|, |fNIRS|) to avoid single-modality overreach.

ccmi_fusion.name: C3: CCMI MinOverlap
ccmi_fusion.reason: Formalizes C2 as conservative cross-modal intersection with stronger scale/clip range.
ccmi_fusion.conclusion: Good, but slightly weaker than slope-gated CCMI.

ccmi_fusion.name: C4: CCMI HRFDelayedFNIRS
ccmi_fusion.reason: Confirms fast EEG residual with delayed fNIRS residual to match hemodynamic lag.
ccmi_fusion.conclusion: HRF lag helps, but less than prior-slope gate.

ccmi_fusion.name: C5: CCMI PriorSlopeGate
ccmi_fusion.reason: Learns when signal residual is helpful by prior trajectory slope bucket.

output_head.name: H1: 200 manual dimwise fusion
output_head.reason: Valence uses risk expert; arousal uses conformal median band.

output_head.name: H2: 218 SCRF
output_head.reason: Applies sign-consistent hierarchical residual field only on valence.

output_head.name: H3: 222 BCRF on SCRF
output_head.reason: Adds Bayesian credible residual field to SCRF with confidence scaling.
output_head.conclusion: Current global best, but tiny gain over SCRF.

output_head.name: H4: 224 BCRF brake disagreement
output_head.reason: Uses SCRF correction only when BCRF and SCRF agree.
output_head.conclusion: Safer than raw BCRF but not best.

output_head.name: H5: arousal residual probe
output_head.reason: Tests whether output residual fields should modify arousal.
output_head.conclusion: Arousal correction is not useful; keep arousal conservative.

combined_recommendation.meaning: Best verified EEG-fNIRS path: 6 fNIRS types, baseline subtraction, CCMI PriorSlopeGate.
Not yet verified because sample-level 222 cache is required; previous direct overlay timed out.
